---

## Product

### Overview
- **Name**: Clienta.ai
- **Type**: B2B SaaS -- Multi-tenant AI Chatbot Platform for Customer Support
- **Stage**: Live (Staging + Production deployed; pre-revenue, seeking first paying customers)
- **URL**: clienta.ai (web app on Vercel, API on Railway)

### Description
AI-powered chatbot platform that lets businesses automate customer support using their own knowledge base.

Clienta.ai enables businesses to build intelligent chatbots trained on their uploaded documents (PDFs, Word files, text). The platform uses RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) with GPT-4 to provide accurate, context-aware responses directly from an organization's knowledge base. Businesses can deploy the chatbot on their website via an embeddable widget or connect it to their Line Official Account, managing everything from a single admin dashboard. The platform includes live agent handoff, allowing human agents to take over conversations in real-time when AI cannot resolve a query.

### Key Features
1. **AI-Powered RAG Chatbot** -- Upload documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT) and the AI answers customer questions from your knowledge base using GPT-4, with model routing (GPT-4o-mini for simple/high-confidence queries, GPT-4o for complex ones)
2. **Multi-Channel Deployment** -- Embeddable web chat widget + Line OA integration from a single dashboard
3. **Live Agent Handoff** -- Real-time human takeover when AI confidence is low or customer requests a human agent, with WebSocket-based communication between widget and admin dashboard
4. **AI Guardrails** -- Bot refuses off-topic questions (general knowledge, coding, math) and only answers from the organization's knowledge base, politely suggesting human contact for out-of-scope queries
5. **Knowledge Base Management** -- Upload, process, and manage documents with automatic text extraction, chunking, and embedding generation (pgvector)
6. **Admin Dashboard** -- Conversation monitoring, analytics (response time, bot resolution rate, top intents, usage metrics), team management, widget customization, and billing
7. **Multilingual Native (Thai + English)** -- Purpose-built for non-Latin language support with seamless language switching; proven with Thai+English, extensible to other languages
8. **Bot Testing Playground** -- Test chatbot responses within the admin dashboard before deploying to live site
9. **Customizable Widget** -- Brand colors, greeting message, position, logo to match corporate identity
10. **Analytics & Insights** -- Conversation metrics, unanswered question tracking, low confidence reports, usage-based billing metrics

---

## Target Customer

### Primary Segment
- **Industry**: SMBs across various sectors (e-commerce, SaaS companies, B2B services, retail, professional services)
- **Company Size**: 1-200 employees (sweet spot: 1-50 for self-serve, 51-200 for sales-assisted)
- **Geography**: International (English-first), with strong multilingual capability for non-English markets (Thai, SEA, APAC)
- **Tech Maturity**: Low to Medium -- the product emphasizes no-code setup ("Upload docs, customize, deploy in minutes")

### Key Personas

#### Buyer Persona: Business Owner / Founder
- **Role**: Runs the business, manages customer experience
- **Reports To**: Board / Investors (or self for solopreneurs)
- **Measured On**: Customer satisfaction, operational cost, response time, revenue
- **Budget Authority**: Yes

#### Buyer Persona: Head of Customer Support / Operations Manager
- **Role**: Manages support team, monitors SLAs, ensures customer satisfaction
- **Reports To**: CEO / COO
- **Measured On**: Resolution rate, response time, CSAT, cost per ticket
- **Budget Authority**: Yes (for tools under a threshold)

#### User Persona: Customer Support Agent
- **Role**: Handles escalated conversations via live agent handoff, monitors chatbot performance
- **Daily Challenges**: High volume of repetitive questions, after-hours support gaps, multilingual customer base
- **Success Metrics**: Tickets resolved, response time, customer feedback

#### User Persona: End Customer (Visitor)
- **Role**: Visits the business website or Line OA, asks questions about products/services
- **Daily Challenges**: Waiting for human agents, not getting answers outside business hours
- **Success Metrics**: Gets accurate answer quickly, can reach a human when needed

### Pain Points
1. **High Support Cost & Scalability**: Hiring and training human agents is expensive; support cannot scale 24/7 without significant cost increase. The platform promises 40-70% call center cost reduction.
2. **Repetitive Questions Consume Agent Time**: FAQ and common questions (product info, pricing, policies) take up agent bandwidth that could be used for complex issues.
3. **No After-Hours Support**: Customers who reach out outside business hours get no response, leading to lost leads and poor satisfaction. The platform provides 24/7 AI support.
4. **Lack of True Multilingual Capability**: Businesses serving multilingual customer bases find that most chatbot solutions only offer surface-level language support without real non-Latin language optimization.
5. **Difficult AI Setup**: Most AI chatbot solutions require technical expertise (prompt engineering, training data preparation). Clienta.ai requires only document upload.

### Jobs-to-Be-Done
- **Functional**: Automate responses to common customer questions from existing business documents; provide 24/7 support; escalate complex issues to human agents seamlessly; monitor chatbot performance and improve knowledge base
- **Emotional**: Feel confident that customers are being served well even outside business hours; feel in control of the AI (guardrails, handoff capability)
- **Social**: Be perceived as a modern, responsive business that uses cutting-edge technology; demonstrate operational efficiency to stakeholders

---

## Business Model

### Pricing
- **Model**: Subscription (Monthly / Annual with 10% annual discount) + Usage-based (messages/month)
- **Trial**: 14-day free trial, no credit card required, full feature access
- **Tiers**:

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | Messages/mo | Documents | Channels | Analytics | Support |
|------|---------|--------|-------------|-----------|----------|-----------|---------|
| Starter | $29 | $26/mo | 1,000 | 10 | 1 (Web or Line) | Basic | Email |
| Growth | $79 | $71/mo | 10,000 | 100 | 5 | Advanced | Priority + Custom branding |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | 100,000+ | 1,000 | Unlimited | Advanced | Dedicated + Custom integrations + SLA + On-premise option |

- **Billing Metric**: Bot responses per month (user messages are not counted)
- **Payment Providers**: Stripe (Primary, international) + Omise (Thailand/SEA regional)

### Sales
- **Cycle Length**: [TBD -- not yet validated with real customers]
- **Motion**: Self-serve for Starter/Growth (sign up, trial, convert); Sales-assisted/contact for Enterprise
- **Channels**: Direct (website signup), content marketing, community channels, Product Hunt / SaaS directories
- **Onboarding**: Guided setup wizard (widget or Line OA), sample knowledge base, documentation

### Funding & Growth Targets
- **Status**: Bootstrapped, solo founder, operating lean
- **Strategy**: Capital efficiency and early revenue validation before raising capital
- **Go-to-Market**: Founder-led sales targeting high-value B2B segments where AI automation drives measurable cost reduction
- **Revenue Target**: $30-40K MRR within 12 months; $1M ARR within 24 months through 30-50 subscription clients
- **Break-even**: Projected within 12-18 months

### Unit Economics (Projected from Implementation Plan)
- **Average Customer Value**: ~5,000 THB/month (~$140)
- **OpenAI Cost per Customer**: ~1,500 THB/month (~$42)
- **Infrastructure per Customer**: ~300 THB/month (~$8)
- **Gross Margin Target**: 60%+
- **Break-even**: ~15 customers (covers infrastructure + 1 developer)
- **Profitable Target**: ~30 customers

## Positioning

### Competitive Landscape

| Competitor | Type | Pricing | Strength | Weakness | Our Advantage |
|------------|------|---------|----------|----------|---------------|
| **Tidio** | Live chat + AI (Lyro) | $24-2,999/mo (AI add-on separate, effective $100-150+/mo for AI) | 300K+ customers, deep Shopify integration, Lyro AI (Claude-powered), multichannel (web, FB, IG, WhatsApp) | PDF upload gated at $749/mo (Plus); fragmented pricing (plan + Lyro + Flows); e-commerce focused; conversation caps disrupt service | All-in pricing at $29-79/mo; PDF upload at entry tier; fixed predictable billing; built-in live agent handoff |
| **Chatbase** | RAG chatbot builder | $40-500/mo (credit-based) | Easy no-code setup, 80+ languages, AI Actions (agentic), wide channel coverage | No native live agent handoff (third-party only); credit-based billing (unpredictable costs); poor support reviews (2.1/5 Trustpilot); no conversation flow builder | Native live agent handoff; fixed-tier pricing; lower entry at $29/mo; transparent billing |
| **CustomGPT** | Enterprise RAG platform | $99-499+/mo | 1,400+ file formats, anti-hallucination with citations, SOC2 Type 2 compliant, 92+ languages | $99/mo minimum (expensive for SMBs); no native live agent handoff; no conversation memory; reliability issues reported | 70% lower entry price; native live agent handoff; SMB-friendly setup and pricing |
| **SiteGPT** | RAG chatbot from website/docs | $39-259/mo (white-label +$39/mo extra) | Fast no-code deploy, multiple training sources (URL, PDF, Notion, YouTube), auto-sync content, 95+ languages | No native live agent handoff (third-party only); white-label costs extra ($78/mo effective); no conversation memory; WhatsApp still "coming soon" | Built-in live agent handoff; lower effective price; all-in pricing with branding included |
| DIY OpenAI / Custom Solutions | Custom build | Variable (no SaaS cost, but dev time) | Full control, no recurring SaaS fees | Requires technical expertise, no UI, no multi-tenant, no analytics, months of dev time | No-code interface, ready-made admin dashboard, multi-channel, built-in analytics |

#### Competitive Positioning Summary

**Common gaps across all competitors that Clienta.ai fills:**
1. **No native live agent handoff** -- Chatbase, CustomGPT, and SiteGPT all require third-party tools for human escalation; Tidio has it but at $100+/mo
2. **Higher effective pricing** -- Tidio's AI features cost $100-150+/mo; CustomGPT starts at $99/mo; SiteGPT is $78/mo with white-label; Clienta.ai starts at $29/mo
3. **Unpredictable billing** -- Chatbase and SiteGPT use credit-based billing; Clienta.ai uses fixed-tier pricing with clear limits
4. **Line OA as regional expansion advantage** -- None of the 4 competitors offer native Line OA support, giving Clienta.ai exclusive access to Thai/SEA markets where Line dominates

### Differentiation
What makes Clienta.ai uniquely different:
1. **Lowest Price, Full Features** -- $29/mo all-in with PDF upload, live agent handoff, and analytics included; competitors charge $40-150+/mo for comparable features or gate them behind expensive tiers
2. **Native Live Agent Handoff** -- Built-in real-time human takeover with full conversation context; most competitors (Chatbase, CustomGPT, SiteGPT) require third-party integrations
3. **No-Code, Document-First Setup** -- Upload your existing docs (PDF, Word, TXT), and the AI starts answering in seconds; no training data preparation or prompt engineering required
4. **Cost-Effective Architecture** -- Uses pgvector instead of expensive vector databases (saves ~$70/month), intelligent model routing (GPT-4o-mini for simple queries) reduces AI cost by 60-80%
5. **True Multilingual (Non-Latin Ready)** -- Purpose-built for non-Latin language support (proven with Thai+English), not just "supports 80+ languages" as a checkbox
6. **Data Privacy Compliant** -- Built with privacy-first architecture supporting GDPR, CCPA, and PDPA compliance

### Why Now

1. **AI infrastructure costs dropped dramatically** -- Models like GPT-4o-mini and optimized embeddings have made delivering high-quality conversational AI commercially viable for SaaS products at SMB price points
2. **RAG technology matured** -- Retrieval Augmented Generation is now reliable enough for production customer support, reducing hallucination to acceptable levels
3. **SMBs are AI-ready** -- Businesses of all sizes now expect AI-powered tools; the barrier to adoption has shifted from "should we use AI?" to "which AI tool is easiest to set up?"
4. **No dominant player in the document-first chatbot space** -- Existing solutions are either too expensive (enterprise), too complex (DIY), or missing key features (live handoff, transparent pricing)

### Value Proposition
**For** SMBs globally
**Who** need to provide 24/7 customer support without scaling their support team
**Our product is** an AI chatbot platform
**That** lets you automate customer support from your existing knowledge base in minutes
**Unlike** expensive enterprise chatbot platforms that charge $100+/mo or require third-party tools for live handoff
**We** provide a complete, no-code solution with built-in live agent handoff, multilingual support, and transparent pricing starting at $29/mo

### Key Messages
1. **"Build intelligent chatbots powered by your knowledge base. Deploy in minutes, not weeks."** -- Speed and simplicity of setup
2. **"Full AI chatbot with live agent handoff — starting at $29/mo"** -- Price advantage over competitors ($40-150+/mo) with built-in features they charge extra for
3. **"Reduce support costs by 40-70% with 24/7 AI that knows your business"** -- Clear ROI and business value

## Brand Voice

### Tone
- **Primary**: Professional but approachable
- **Secondary**: Helpful, confident, modern
- **Avoid**: Overly technical jargon, aggressive sales language, corporate stiffness

### Language
- **Primary**: English (product UI, marketing site, all customer-facing content)
- **Multilingual Content**: Localized marketing for specific markets (Thai, SEA) as needed
- **Technical Terms**: Use English for tech terms (API, webhook, RAG, etc.)
- **Formality**: Semi-formal -- professional enough for B2B, friendly enough for SMB founders

### Do's and Don'ts

| Do | Don't |
|----|-------|
| Use clear, simple language | Use unnecessary jargon or buzzwords |
| Emphasize ease of setup ("in minutes") | Overpromise capabilities |
| Highlight multilingual capability and non-Latin language support | Position as region-specific only |
| Show concrete ROI numbers (40-70% cost reduction) | Make unsubstantiated claims |
| Be honest about limitations | Claim to replace all human agents |
| Use "your knowledge base" (ownership) | Say "our AI knows everything" |

### Sample Phrases
- **Headline**: "AI Chatbot for Customer Support"
- **Sub-headline**: "Build intelligent chatbots powered by your knowledge base. Deploy in minutes, not weeks."
- **CTA**: "Start 14-Day Free Trial" / "Start Free Trial"
- **Reassurance**: "No credit card required. Cancel anytime."
- **Value**: "Join businesses in 20+ countries providing 24/7 support with Clienta.ai."
- **Feature**: "GPT-4 understands context and provides accurate answers directly from your uploaded knowledge base."

### Founder
- **Role**: Solo Founder & Full-stack Developer
- **Background**: Product development professional in the banking sector with experience building and improving enterprise-scale systems
- **Expertise**: Product strategy, system design, hands-on full-stack development -- able to both define and execute technical solutions efficiently
- **Domain Knowledge**: Enterprise operations, process automation, and AI-driven workflow optimization -- particularly relevant to customer interaction and support environments

## Product Roadmap

### Current Phase (Implemented)
- Phase 1: Web Chat Widget with RAG (DONE)
- Phase 2: Line OA Integration (DONE)
- Phase 3: RAG System with pgvector (DONE)
- Phase 4: Admin Dashboard (DONE)
- Phase 5: Analytics & Monitoring (DONE)
- Phase 6: Billing & Launch Prep (DONE)
- AI Guardrails (DONE)
- Live Agent Handoff (IN PROGRESS -- feature/phase2-live-agent-handoff branch)

### Upcoming
- Voice Bot + IVR (from Solution Design -- future phase)
- Smart Routing (auto-assign by skill/department, queue management, SLA tracking)
- CRM/ERP Integration
- Additional Channels (Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, Phone/SIP)
- Multilingual AI (beyond Thai/English)
- Predictive Analytics
- Enterprise SLA features
- On-premise deployment option

### Architecture Scaling Milestones
- **0-10 customers**: Current architecture (single instance, ~$30/mo infra)
- **10-50 customers**: Scale to 2 instances, Supabase Pro, ~$130/mo
- **50-200 customers**: 4 instances, read replica, CDN Pro, ~$500-800/mo
- **200+ customers**: AWS/GCP auto-scaling, dedicated infrastructure, $2,000+/mo

## Technical Context (Brief, for Agent Reference)

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|-----------|
| Monorepo | pnpm workspace (`packages/api`, `packages/web`, `packages/widget`) |
| API | Node.js 20, Fastify, TypeScript, Zod validation |
| Web Dashboard | Next.js 14 (App Router), TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, Zustand, TanStack Query |
| Chat Widget | React + Vite (embeddable JS bundle) |
| Database | PostgreSQL + pgvector (Supabase), Prisma ORM |
| Cache/Queue | Redis (Upstash), BullMQ |
| Storage | Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible) |
| AI | OpenAI (GPT-4o / GPT-4o-mini, text-embedding-3-small 1536-dim) |
| Real-time | WebSocket (@fastify/websocket) |
| Auth | JWT (API), NextAuth v5 (Web) |
| Payments | Stripe (International) + Omise (Thailand) |
| Hosting | Railway (API), Vercel (Web) |
| Monitoring | Sentry, Axiom, UptimeRobot, Discord webhooks |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |
